Text: Add clear 'Pay now' / 'I've paid' CTA for pending orders
Force HTTPS across entire site (redirect HTTP → HTTPS)
Fix Feedback page routing bug (must not load Privacy first)
Show Buy Now button on fixed-price listings
Add explicit payment instructions (bank details + steps)
Clearly explain email verification requirement on signup + login
Add real support contact method (email or form)
Expand Privacy Policy and Terms to production-grade legal docs
Improve registration UX (date picker, suburb/postcode autocomplete)
Differentiate login errors (unverified vs wrong password)
Allow phone + bank details in messages (add safety warning + logging + feature-flag for revert when Bidra Pay is live)
Clarify listing types (Fixed Price vs Timed Offers) during creation
Add report button to all listings + enforce prohibited items
Make Bidra clearly Australian (AUD labels, AU indicators)
Standardise all CTAs as real buttons (no text-only actions)
Improve browse filters layout and symmetry
Add timestamps and read clarity to messages
Add clear order status timeline (Placed → Paid → Completed)
Surface safety warnings near payment and messaging actions
Clean up admin listings layout (truncate titles, align badges)
Polish admin audit log UI (tabs, spacing, row clarity)
Unify messages list cards (title + preview + timestamp)
Redesign chat UI (message bubbles, send button)
Upgrade notifications UI (real buttons, less dead space)
Make order list actions prominent buttons
Replace 'Confirm payment received' heading with real CTA
Fix account settings layout (remove OR text, align fields)
Standardise admin action buttons (delete, resolve, block)
Improve admin table hierarchy (headers, spacing, tooltips)
Add active state styling to top navigation

P0-01 Unauthenticated Buy Now silent failure: On listing pages, logged-out users can click Buy Now and see a brief 'Not authenticated' flash then remain on page. Must disable Buy Now when logged out OR redirect to /auth/login (with ?next=...) and show clear message.

P0-02 Editing a listing does not update the price: Seller edits price, Save changes shows new value in form but public listing remains unchanged. Ensure edits propagate and public listing reflects updated price.

P0-03 No way for sellers to complete orders: After buyers pay, orders can remain stuck at 'Paid' with no clear seller action to mark received/handed-over/completed. Add seller controls to confirm handover and complete order.

P0-04 Buyers cannot mark payment as made: After Buy Now, order page instructs payment but no 'I've paid' / confirm payment action to advance order lifecycle. Implement buyer payment confirmation and status advance.

P0-05 Missing 'Pay now' CTA in orders list: Buyer sees 'Pay now binding order — please pay to proceed' but no actionable button/link to payment page. Add prominent Pay now button to reach /orders/[id]/pay (and confirm).
P0-06 Confusing duplication on sell/listing forms: Repeated explanatory text about sale types appears under multiple sections. Remove duplication; show each instruction once near the relevant inputs.
P0-07 Reporting a chat shows no immediate confirmation: After submitting report, user sees no feedback until attempting delete. Must show success toast/message immediately upon report submit.
P0-08 Messages sometimes duplicate: After sending, chat may show two identical copies. Ensure message append happens once (dedupe by id/client nonce) and UI renders exactly one per send.

P0-09 Leaving feedback doesn’t update order status: Orders list still shows Leave feedback after feedback submitted, allowing duplicates. Update status/CTA to reflect completed and prevent multiple submissions.
P0-10 Self-reporting possible: Report button appears on seller’s own listing. Hide/disable report on own listing (seller view).
P0-11 'View order' link tiny/truncated: Orders list 'View order – [ID]' is small, blends into text, truncates ID. Make it a distinct button/link with clear spacing and readable ID.
P1-12 Wrong date format + buried 18+ requirement: Sign-up uses mm/dd/yyyy; AU expects dd/mm/yyyy. Make 18+ prominent on signup, not tiny. Fix DOB input UX to AU format.
P1-13 Location input restrictive/unclear: Requires exact 'postcode suburb, state' string; no dropdown/autocomplete. Add state dropdown + clear examples and friendlier validation guidance.
P1-14 Weak password guidance: No visible strength/min requirements. Add minimum length and basic complexity guidance + strength indicator.
P1-15 Messaging navigation bugs: Inbox/back inside a thread sometimes needs double click; inconsistent back nav. Ensure single click reliably returns to messages list.
P1-16 Generic auth errors: 'Incorrect email or password'/'Not authenticated' even for unverified email or other causes. Show specific guidance (verify email, restricted account, etc.).
P1-17 Contact form inaccessible when logged out: Logged-out users can’t submit support. Provide contact option without login.
P1-18 Fees page lacks concrete numbers: Mentions example 7% but not actual current fees. Publish current success fee and any listing/payment fees plainly.
P1-19 Watch button provides no feedback: Watch action doesn’t change label/style. After click, show 'Watching' + visible state change.
P1-20 No direct Message seller button on order page: Buyer told to message seller but must navigate manually. Add Message seller CTA on order page.
P1-21 Truncated order IDs/spacing: Long IDs wrap/truncate unpredictably in orders list. Redesign layout so ID + actions remain readable on small screens.

P2-22 Placeholder text truncates on smaller screens AND P2-23 Homepage value proposition weak: Fix responsive placeholder truncation; strengthen homepage hero/value proposition + trust cues (AU identity, fees transparency, safety/prohibited items, etc.).
P2-24 Duplicate category labels on listings AND P2-25 Show/hide password toggle missing: Remove duplicate category breadcrumb/labels; add password visibility toggle on sign-in/sign-up.
P2-26 No visible success indicators for completed orders: After completion/feedback, add clear 'Completed' badges/status for both parties.
P2-27 Watchlist + notification integration: Provide a central watchlist page/dashboard and notification/updates for watched listings/offers (engagement polish).
